description: You are a trajectory design engineer at a commercial lunar lander company. Using the mission requirements in ~/Desktop/lunar_mission_spec.txt, create and run a GMAT script that simulates a complete Earth-to-Moon transfer from the specified LEO parking orbit to the target circular lunar orbit. The simulation must include a multi-body force model, TLI and LOI impulsive burns, and a targeting sequence using a DifferentialCorrector or Optimizer. Record the final mission results (TLI_DeltaV_mps, LOI_DeltaV_mps, Total_DeltaV_mps, TransferTime_days, and FinalLunarAlt_km) in ~/GMAT_output/lunar_transfer_results.txt. Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/lunar_transfer.script. Login credentials: Username: ga, Password: password123
